title: Slightly ReBrushed
description: A vanilla-like mod that expands what vanilla brushes can do by adding faster brushes, along with enchantments to them to make them even better.
body:
A mod designed to improve the archeology experience while keeping it relatively simple and close to vanilla.

Requires librush and Architectury API to work. Fabric version requires Fabric API. Fabric version should work with Quilt as well as long as you're using Fabric API or (assuming it's available) Quilted Fabric API / Quilt Standard Libraries.

It includes diamond and netherite brushes, both are faster than the vanilla brush. They are also more likely to get more and higher level enchantments when using enchanting table. On top of that, the vanilla brush can now be enchanted at an enchanting table as well and repaired at an anvil with copper (configurable on NeoForge, will be configurable in 1.0 on Fabric).

The new enchantments are:

*   Smooth Sweeping - 3 levels, each makes sweeping faster by decreasing the duration of a single brush sweep.
*   Treasures of the Remnants - 3 levels, 20/35/50% chance to get another (random, possibly the same) item.
*   Soft Touch - single level, it makes you unable to mine brushable blocks if you're holding a brush with this enchantment in either of your hands. You can still mine under them, making them to fall and break.
